install apache2-dev/httpd-devel or prepare Apache runtime
install go-ftw only if MRTS/FTW checks are required
install albedo only if native MRTS checks require it
used only if the related runtime build path requires it

components.fix: optional native MRTS: install or cache go-ftw
optional native MRTS: install or cache albedo

verified_producer_readiness.how_to_fix: ensure VERIFIED_RUN_ROOT points outside /root and rerun make prepare-runtime-components
run make runtime-matrix-all after prepare-runtime-components; inspect the verified command log on BLOCKED/FAIL
run make verified-report-run with safe BUILD_ROOT/MATRIX_ROOT paths
install optional go-ftw/albedo/native webserver tooling or leave native MRTS as optional WARN evidence
